github.remaining_pull_request_classification: No remaining pull requests at snapshot time

post_v1_or_optional: frontier-method stable promotion beyond the frozen v1 surface
externally_blocked: CRAN or approved R registry review
external hardware, cloud quota, and curation gates

reconciliation_decisions: The implementation branch starts exactly at the authoritative origin/main commit.
The obsolete local main-only monitoring archive commit is not carried forward because origin/main already contains the implementation and a later canonical archive closeout.
Archived tracks are evidence inputs and are not reopened as incomplete implementation tracks.
External publication, indexing, hardware, quota, and curation gates remain distinct from repository-owned completion.
Generated Astro cache output is excluded from version control and from programme changes.
